de.uka.ilkd.key.rule

Class TacletVariableSVCollector

  • java.lang.Object
    • de.uka.ilkd.key.logic.DefaultVisitor
      • de.uka.ilkd.key.rule.TacletSchemaVariableCollector
        • de.uka.ilkd.key.rule.TacletVariableSVCollector
  • All Implemented Interfaces:
    Visitor

    public class TacletVariableSVCollector
extends TacletSchemaVariableCollector
    This class is used to collect all appearing SchemaVariables that are bound in a Taclet. Duplicates are not removed becaues the use of persistent datastructure and up to now we just have a SetAsList-implementaion causing to have O(sqr(n)) if it would used. The class is used by RuleApps to compute all non-instantiated variables.
